allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''count:'''', d.get\(''''count'''',0\)\); [print\(f''''  id={r[id]}, name={r[name]}''''\) for r in d.get\(''''results'''',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import torch; print\(torch.__version__\); t = torch.tensor\([1.0], device=''cuda''\); print\(''OK:'', t*2\)")
Bash(/usr/local/bin/python3 -c "import torch; print\(torch.__version__\); t = torch.tensor\([1.0], device='cuda'\); print\('OK:', t*2\)" 2>&1)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, ''/usr/local/lib/python3.11/dist-packages''\); import torch; print\(torch.__version__\)")

Bash(# Move HF cache to workspace \(has the tribev2 model weights\)
mv /root/.cache/huggingface/* /workspace/.cache/huggingface/ 2>/dev/null
# Move nilearn data to workspace 
mv /root/nilearn_data /workspace/.cache/nilearn 2>/dev/null
# Clean root cache
rm -rf /root/.cache/pip /root/.cache/matplotlib /root/.cache/neuralset /root/.cache/rosetta
echo "Moved caches to /workspace/.cache/"
du -sh /workspace/.cache/*/)
Bash(python -c "import torch; print\(torch.__version__\); t = torch.tensor\([1.0], device=''cuda''\); print\(''CUDA OK:'', t*2\)")
